D.name: PARAM_TCELL_LIFESPAN_SD_SLICE
D.comment: T cell lifespan SD in time steps

D.name: PARAM_TCELL_IL2_PROLIF_TH
D.comment: IL-2 accumulation threshold for division [nM*s] = IL2_50 * commit_time

D.name: PARAM_DC_PRIME_K_CD8
D.comment: cDC1 → naive CD8 priming rate [1/s] from QSP k_CD8_act

D.name: PARAM_DC_PRIME_K_TH
D.comment: cDC2 → naive CD4 (Th) priming rate [1/s] from QSP k_Th_act

D.name: PARAM_DC_PRIME_K_TREG
D.comment: cDC2 → naive CD4 (Treg) priming rate [1/s] from QSP k_Treg_act

D.name: PARAM_DC_N_SITES
D.comment: presentation sites per APC (dimensionless) from QSP n_sites_APC

D.name: PARAM_F_NTREG
D.comment: fraction of activated naive CD4 → Treg (dimensionless) from QSP f_nTreg

D.name: PARAM_MDSC_IC50_NO_CTL
D.comment: MDSC IC50 NO on T cell cytotoxicity [nM]

D.name: PARAM_MDSC_IC50_ArgI_CTL
D.comment: MDSC IC50 ArgI on T cell cytotoxicity [nM]

D.name: PARAM_MDSC_EC50_ArgI_Treg
D.comment: MDSC EC50 ArgI on Treg expansion [nM]

D.name: PARAM_PD1_SYN
D.comment: PD1 per synapse on T cell

D.name: PARAM_PDL1_SYN_MAX
D.comment: PDL1 per synapse max (base * IFNg fold-increase)

D.name: PARAM_PDL1_CELL
D.comment: total PDL1 per cancer cell (base, no IFNg)

D.name: PARAM_PDL1_INTERNALIZATION_RATE
D.comment: PDL1 internalization rate [1/s] from QSP k_in_PDL1

D.name: PARAM_IFNG_PDL1_HALF
D.comment: IFNg EC50 for PDL1 induction [nM] from QSP IFNg_50_ind

D.name: PARAM_TREG_CTLA4_50
D.comment: CTLA4 occupancy half-max for Treg inactivation

D.name: PARAM_K_ADCC
D.comment: anti-CTLA4 ADCC rate of Treg per timestep

D.name: PARAM_ESCAPE_BASE
D.comment: T cell kill cancer escape prob

D.name: PARAM_ESCAPE_MAC_BASE
D.comment: M1 mac kill cancer escape prob

D.name: PARAM_K_C_EXH
D.comment: Cancer half-max for basal exhaustion (K_C_exh in cells)

D.name: PARAM_EXHAUST_IL10_EC50
D.comment: IL-10 EC50 for Treg exhaustion modulation [nM]

D.name: PARAM_K_TH_TREG
D.comment: Th to Treg rate per timestep

D.name: PARAM_MAC_M2_POL
D.comment: M1 to M2 polarization rate per timestep

D.name: PARAM_MAC_M1_POL
D.comment: M2 to M1 polarization rate per timestep

D.name: PARAM_ECM_DEPOSITION_RATE
D.comment: ECM deposition rate [nmol/(fib_density_unit*s)] from QSP k_col_myCAF_sec, f_col_basal

D.name: PARAM_ECM_DECAY_RATE
D.comment: ECM natural decay rate [1/s] from QSP k_col_deg

D.name: PARAM_ECM_TGFB_EC50
D.comment: TGFb EC50 for ECM deposition [nM] from QSP TGFb_50_col_sec

D.name: PARAM_FIB_CAF_EC50
D.comment: TGFb EC50 for CAF activation + interconversion [nM] (TGFb_50_CAF_act)

D.name: PARAM_FIB_IL6_ICAF_FACTOR
D.comment: f_IL6_iCAF: IL-6 amplification weight for iCAF

D.name: PARAM_FIB_ICAF_TGFB_SUPPRESS_EC50
D.comment: TGF-β EC50 suppressing IL-1R1 on iCAF [nM] (P_TGFb_50_IL1R1)

D.name: PARAM_FIB_ICAF_TGFB_SUPPRESS_N
D.comment: TGF-β suppression Hill coeff (ODE uses Hill=1)

Call.comment: Init ECM floor to baseline (overridden per-voxel by -i 1 structured init)

D.name: PARAM_DC_RECRUIT_K_CDC1
D.comment: cDC1 recruitment rate per voxel per step

D.name: PARAM_DC_RECRUIT_K_CDC2
D.comment: cDC2 recruitment rate per voxel per step

D.name: PARAM_ANTIGEN_DEPOSIT
D.comment: antigen deposited per cancer death [molecules/cell] = P1_C1

D.name: PARAM_ANTIGEN_CAPTURE_THRESHOLD
D.comment: min antigen for B cell capture [molecules] = 0.1 * P1_C1

D.name: PARAM_T_CELL_LIFE_MEAN_SLICE
D.comment: mean T cell lifespan in timesteps

D.name: PARAM_DC_ANTIGEN_50
D.comment: antigen EC50 for maturation [molecules/voxel] = P1_C1 (1 death equiv)

D.name: PARAM_VAS_50
D.comment: VEGF EC50 for sprouting [nM] from VEGF_50

D.name: PARAM_VAS_REGRESS_RATE
D.comment: vessel regression base rate [prob/step] from k_K_d

D.name: PARAM_VAS_VEGFA_SURVIVAL_EC50
D.comment: VEGF EC50 for vessel survival [nM] from VEGF_50

D.name: PARAM_CANCER_SENESCENT_MEAN_LIFE
D.comment: senescent cancer mean life in slices

D.name: PARAM_CCL2_RELEASE
D.comment: CCL2 cancer secretion [pmol/(cell*s)] from QSP k_CCL2_sec

D.name: PARAM_STEM_VEGFA_RELEASE
D.comment: VEGFA stem secretion [pmol/(cell*s)] from QSP k_vas_Csec

D.name: PARAM_PROG_VEGFA_RELEASE
D.comment: VEGFA progenitor secretion [pmol/(cell*s)] — same base rate as stem

D.name: PARAM_CANCER_IL1_RELEASE_STEM
D.comment: IL-1 stem secretion [pmol/(cell*s)] from QSP k_IL1_sec

D.name: PARAM_IFNG_RELEASE
D.comment: IFN-γ per-cell secretion [pmol/(cell*s)] from QSP k_IFNg_Tsec

D.name: PARAM_IL2_RELEASE
D.comment: IL-2 per-cell secretion [pmol/(cell*s)] from QSP k_IL2_sec

D.name: PARAM_CCL5_TREG_RATIO
D.comment: CCL5/CCR5 recruitment rate relative to base (k_CCR5_Treg_rec / q_Treg_T_in)

D.name: PARAM_TREG_TGFB_RELEASE
D.comment: Treg TGF-β secretion [pmol/(cell*s)] from QSP k_TGFb_Tsec

D.name: PARAM_MAC_TGFB_RELEASE
D.comment: M2 MAC TGF-β secretion [pmol/(cell*s)] from QSP k_TGFb_Msec

D.name: PARAM_MAC_IL10_RELEASE
D.comment: M2 MAC IL-10 secretion [pmol/(cell*s)] from QSP k_IL10_sec

D.name: PARAM_IL12_RELEASE
D.comment: M1 MAC IL-12 secretion [pmol/(cell*s)] from QSP k_IL12_Msec

D.name: PARAM_DC_IL12_RELEASE
D.comment: Mature DC IL-12 secretion [pmol/(cell*s)] from QSP k_IL12_sec (mcDC1)

D.name: PARAM_MAC_VEGFA_RELEASE
D.comment: M2 MAC VEGF-A secretion [pmol/(cell*s)] from QSP k_vas_Msec

D.name: PARAM_FIB_MYCAF_TGFB_RELEASE
D.comment: myCAF TGF-β secretion [pmol/(cell*s)] from QSP k_TGFb_sec_myCAF

D.name: PARAM_FIB_ICAF_IL6_RELEASE
D.comment: iCAF IL-6 secretion [pmol/(cell*s)] from QSP k_IL6_sec_iCAF

D.name: PARAM_FIB_MYCAF_VEGFA_RELEASE
D.comment: myCAF VEGF-A secretion [pmol/(cell*s)] from QSP k_vas_myCAF_sec

D.name: PARAM_NO_RELEASE
D.comment: MDSC NO secretion [pmol/(cell*s)] from QSP k_NO_sec

D.name: PARAM_ARGI_RELEASE
D.comment: MDSC ArgI secretion [pmol/(cell*s)] from QSP k_ArgI_sec

D.name: PARAM_MDSC_EC50_IL6_REC
D.comment: IL-6 EC50 for MDSC recruitment boost [nM]
